## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? One paragraph or bullet list. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new capability
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — no behaviour change
- [ ] `chore` — tooling / CI / dependency bump

## Checklist

- [ ] `make fmt` — no diff after run
- [ ] `make lint` — zero errors
- [ ] `make sec` — trivy + gitleaks clean
- [ ] `terraform validate` passes in every affected env
- [ ] No AWS account IDs, secrets, or credentials committed
- [ ] If IAM changed: least-privilege confirmed, no new wildcard `*` actions without justification
- [ ] If a new architectural decision: ADR drafted in `docs/adr/`
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits: `type(scope): description`
